pending_work.description: eng: add npm run lint script to package.json, update CI to use npm run lint, extend CI syntax check to cli.js+install.js+lib/parsers.js, fix smoke test (sleep 2 -> retry loop 15x1s). Branch kanbanbot/eng-lint-smoke-20260502. 79 tests pass, lint clean.

css: add --danger and --danger-dim CSS variables to VARIABLES region; replace all hardcoded #ef4444 with var(--danger) and rgba(239,68,68,0.15) with var(--danger-dim). Also closes gap where app.js already referenced var(--danger) but it was undefined. Branch kanbanbot/improve-danger-css-var-20260502. 79 tests pass, lint clean.

infrastructure_notes: PERSISTENT ISSUE (confirmed runs: 2026-04-10 through 2026-05-02 run #25252045025): safeoutputs MCP server unavailable. create_pull_request/add_comment/noop/missing_tool all fail with tool-does-not-exist. gh CLI also unauthenticated. No GitHub writes possible. Branches exist only locally. Maintainer action needed: ensure safeoutputs MCP server is enabled in kanbanbot workflow.
